ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category (e.g., Murder, Rape, Robbery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent crime category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the crime incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims */,
  "injured_count" INTEGER /* Number of injured */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "arrests" INTEGER /* Number of arrests */,
  "charges_laid" INTEGER /* Whether charges were laid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Downtown, Uptown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the region (as a polygon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Street, Park) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., 7-day, 28-day, YTD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time period (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime statistic */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of crime incidents */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change from previous year */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Moving average of crime incidents */,
  "top_category" TEXT /* Top crime category for the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login time */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logout time */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log time */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trail_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trail time */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object affected by the action (e.g., crime incident, report) */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view crime statistics, update crime incident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report time */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., crime statistics, crime trends) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data (in JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of the chart (e.g., bar, line, pie) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Chart data (in JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
